items.claim: Abdul Husan hasn't fought MMA since December of 2025.
items.quote: hasn't fought MMA since December of 2025.

items.claim: Cody Gibson is coming off back-to-back losses, including a first-round finish against Richi Lang.
items.quote: coming off back-to-back losses... last one being in October against Richi Lang, getting finished in the very first round.
Mike Davis is plus 130, 25 to 33. So Mike Davis getting up there in age.

items.claim: Brendan Rivero has lost three fights in a row, getting finished in the first round in all of them.
items.quote: Roberto has lost a bunch of fights here. Three in a row. Finished in all of his fights in the first round.
